title: Aberdeen PITAS (Personal Information Technology Awareness Service) 2002 Agreement Template
author: Peter S. Kastner
abstract: Contract template (with <NAME><COMPANY> placeholders) for Aberdeen's Personal Information Technology Awareness Service (PITAS) 2002 program at $2,500/year. Deliverables: Supplier Snapshot on Aberdeen website, objective press quotes, analyst reference for press/investors, and bi-annual one-hour briefings. Principal analysts: Peter Kastner, Ethan Cohen, Isaac Ro. Includes renewal, reprint fees ($1/reprint), and legal liability provisions.
importance_rationale: Artifact of the light-touch PITAS tier within Aberdeen's PIT practice; documents the commercial entry-point for vendor awareness at $2,500/yr.
relevance_rationale: Specific template contents are largely obsolete but informative for commercial history of industry-analyst awareness services.
